column1: Jake McCarthy leads the slate with a strong hit probability and benefits from a premium leadoff spot at home, a hitter-friendly park, and a clear platoon advantage against Brady Singer. Luis Arraez also offers excellent reliability, riding a high rate of games with a hit and a favorable lefty matchup, though he faces a tougher park environment. Ernie Clement and Yandy Diaz remain steady options, but McCarthy’s combination of matchup, park, and lineup position stands out for Beat The Streak selections.
